what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel-memory attachment that points to a board item.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no prose body.
standouts: It is a cross-reference artifact linking a channel memory attachment to a specific board item via a board:// URI.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Markdown file with an empty body after the frontmatter.
board:// URI scheme is used for board item references.
concerns: No content beyond metadata; purpose depends entirely on external board item and attachment resolution.
No author or source message reference is recorded.
notes: A thin metadata stub that ties a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item f5a42017.
questions: What content or message does this attachment wrap?
What is the nature of board://item-f5a42017?
Is the target URI resolvable within the ledger?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a board_items attachment and it does exactly that: it records a target board item reference and nothing else.
intention_signals: To create a durable, discoverable link between a channel memory artifact and a board item, likely for retrieval or context threading.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped, URI-based pointer from a channel attachment to a board item, enabling graph traversal between channel memory and board items.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment stub in the dragnet-development channel that references board item f5a42017 via a board:// URI and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a link between a channel memory attachment and a specific board item for later lookup and context association.
